daily.today_energy: Mercury's dancing in your sector of self-expression, Sag. You're giving main character energy today—lean into it. Your vibe is magnetic and authentic, so don't dim yourself down for anyone.
daily.love: Whether single or coupled up, your words have power rn. Say what you actually mean. If you've been sitting on feelings, the universe is basically nudging you to speak your truth. Vulnerability hits different today.
daily.career: Your creative problem-solving is *chef's kiss* right now. That project you've been stuck on? Fresh perspective incoming. Trust your instincts—they're unusually sharp. This is your moment to pitch that idea.
daily.health: Your nervous system wants grounding rn. Try spending time outside or doing something with your hands. Your energy peaks when you're moving intentionally, so a walk or gentle workout will realign you beautifully.

weekly.overview: Mercury's dancing through your sector of self-expression this week, babe. It's giving main character energy. Trust the sudden creative impulses and conversations that pop up—they're basically the universe sliding into your DMs with exactly what you need to hear.
weekly.love: Venus is sprinkling some soft magic here. Whether you're coupled or solo, this is peak time for authentic connections and honest conversations. Your vibe is magnetic rn—lean into being your genuine self and watch how people respond to the real you.
weekly.career: Jupiter's winking at your professional sphere, suggesting momentum building behind the scenes. Small actions taken now have bigger ripple effects than you realize. Stay curious about unexpected opportunities—they're not distractions, they're breadcrumbs.
weekly.health: Your body's asking for more rest and intentional movement this week. Nothing extreme needed; think gentle stretches, walks in nature, or whatever makes you feel grounded. Your nervous system is basically asking you to slow down with love, not force.
